item.title: The Plunging Birthrate
item.description: We asked women about their views on having kids.

item.title: Pentagon Fires Another Laser at a Drone, Prompting a New Air Closure
item.description: After the downing of a Customs and Border Protection drone, the F.A.A. closed the airspace above Fort Hancock, Texas.

item.title: With Possible Iran Strike Looming, U.S. Says Staff Can Leave Israel, and Urges Speed
item.description: In an email to embassy workers Friday morning, Ambassador Mike Huckabee warned them that if they wanted to leave Israel, they “should do so TODAY.”

item.title: Green Party Defeats Labour in U.K. Special Election, in Blow to Starmer
item.description: The result marks the first time the Greens have won a British parliamentary by-election and signals the frustration of left-leaning voters with Prime ...

item.title: How India Became One of the World’s Biggest Economies
item.description: India has grown rapidly despite its slow industrialization, and its economy is now nearly as big as Japan’s.
